title: [RMI] Fake Torch
description: A mod that adds a new "Fake Torch" item which acts like an torch, and a lever.
body:
[RMI] is a series that i started at Reddit, where i'll get the community ideas and try my best to make them! user: u/thegodlipe
 

Ever wanted to make a secret place? Tried to hide ur levers? Here is ur solution.

FAKE TORCHES!

This item acts as a torch + a lever! Very simple, but very effective!

 
Crafting Recipe:

R R R

R T R

R R R

 

Where:

R = Redstone

T = Normal Torch

 

Suggested by the user:

u/Mynky
